home.hero.headline: Invitations, reimagined.
home.hero.sub: Create an event in seconds — no account needed. Guests RSVP from any device. Free for most events, €5 for premium features.
home.features.anonymous.title: No account required
home.features.anonymous.body: Start an invitation from any browser. A magic link lets you manage it later.
home.features.global.title: Global from day one
home.features.global.body: Timezones, locales, and currencies handled automatically. Shareable in a click.
home.features.open.title: Open source core
home.features.open.body: AGPLv3. Self-host the core, or use the hosted version. No lock-in.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.free.name: Free
pricing.free.desc: Everything you need for a basic event. No account required.
pricing.paid.name: Premium event
pricing.paid.desc: Pay once per event. Unlocks polish and extras.
pricing.paid.items: Custom URL slug;Remove vite.in branding;Cover image + gallery;Scheduled reminders;Password-protected events
legal.impressum.title: Impressum
legal.privacy.title: Privacy policy
legal.terms.title: Terms of service
legal.draft: Draft — will be finalised before public launch.
